CorgiAI SOCIAL CLUB

It is a place for all hard-working corgis like you and I to connect and chat about AI

OUR TOKEN

$CORGIAI & OUR
ECOSYSTEM

Total $CORGIAI Burned

0.00

$CORGIAI is the core token used within the CorgiAI ecosystem. We want $CORGIAI to be at the heart and centre of everything that we do here. What this means is that $CORGIAI will be equipped with staking utility and will be used as a purchasing token for upcoming CorgiAI related initiatives on our roadmap.

WE EMBRACE

G.O.A.L.

Life's too short for anything less than awesome, and our beloved corgis deserve only the best. As thinkers, innovators, party animals, and life aficionados, we break free from the ordinary and truly Get Out And Live!

OUR STORY

HOW IT BEGINS?

#1

I used to work hard, really hard

24/7. No joke

#2

Last year on my birthday

I forgot... and I worked 'til late

#3

I missed the surprise b-day party

That my partner prepared for me

#4

So here I am

Telling us Corgis to get out and live!

#5

AI ROCKS

I am working 10x more efficiently with AI tools now
